MERGE (ta_kimsuky:ThreatActor {name:'Kimsuky'})
ON CREATE SET
  ta_kimsuky.sponsor = 'North Korea',
  ta_kimsuky.motivation = 'espionage',
  ta_kimsuky.summary = 'North Korea-affiliated nation-state threat actor attributed by AhnLab; conducts espionage campaigns using spear-phishing with malicious lure documents to deploy backdoors and tools (e.g., AppleSeed, Meterpreter, TinyNuke), targeting entities in South Korea and expanding to other geographies in 2017.'
ON MATCH SET
  ta_kimsuky.sponsor = coalesce(ta_kimsuky.sponsor, 'North Korea'),
  ta_kimsuky.motivation = coalesce(ta_kimsuky.motivation, 'espionage'),
  ta_kimsuky.summary = CASE WHEN ta_kimsuky.summary IS NULL OR ta_kimsuky.summary = '' THEN 'North Korea-affiliated nation-state threat actor attributed by AhnLab; conducts espionage campaigns using spear-phishing with malicious lure documents to deploy backdoors and tools (e.g., AppleSeed, Meterpreter, TinyNuke), targeting entities in South Korea and expanding to other geographies in 2017.' ELSE ta_kimsuky.summary END

MERGE (mot_espionage:Motivation {type:'espionage'})
MERGE (ta_kimsuky)-[:motivated_by]->(mot_espionage)

MERGE (country_kr:Country {iso2:'KR'})
ON CREATE SET country_kr.name = 'South Korea'
ON MATCH SET country_kr.name = coalesce(country_kr.name, 'South Korea')

MERGE (victim_sk_entities:Victim {name:'Entities in South Korea'})
ON CREATE SET
  victim_sk_entities.country_iso2 = 'KR',
  victim_sk_entities.sector = 'Other',
  victim_sk_entities.summary = 'A broad set of entities in South Korea targeted by Kimsuky.'
ON MATCH SET
  victim_sk_entities.country_iso2 = coalesce(victim_sk_entities.country_iso2, 'KR'),
  victim_sk_entities.sector = coalesce(victim_sk_entities.sector, 'Other'),
  victim_sk_entities.summary = CASE WHEN victim_sk_entities.summary IS NULL OR victim_sk_entities.summary = '' THEN 'A broad set of entities in South Korea targeted by Kimsuky.' ELSE victim_sk_entities.summary END

MERGE (victim_sk_entities)-[:located_in]->(country_kr)

MERGE (tech_t1566:Technique {technique_id:'T1566'})
ON CREATE SET
  tech_t1566.name = 'Phishing',
  tech_t1566.tactic = 'Initial Access',
  tech_t1566.summary = 'Spear-phishing used to deliver malicious lure documents leading to malware deployment.'
ON MATCH SET
  tech_t1566.name = coalesce(tech_t1566.name, 'Phishing'),
  tech_t1566.tactic = coalesce(tech_t1566.tactic, 'Initial Access'),
  tech_t1566.summary = CASE WHEN tech_t1566.summary IS NULL OR tech_t1566.summary = '' THEN 'Spear-phishing used to deliver malicious lure documents leading to malware deployment.' ELSE tech_t1566.summary END

MERGE (mal_appleseed:Malware {name:'AppleSeed'})
ON CREATE SET
  mal_appleseed.family = 'AppleSeed',
  mal_appleseed.summary = 'Backdoor used by Kimsuky; delivered via spear-phishing.'
ON MATCH SET
  mal_appleseed.family = coalesce(mal_appleseed.family, 'AppleSeed'),
  mal_appleseed.summary = CASE WHEN mal_appleseed.summary IS NULL OR mal_appleseed.summary = '' THEN 'Backdoor used by Kimsuky; delivered via spear-phishing.' ELSE mal_appleseed.summary END

MERGE (tool_meterpreter:Tool {name:'Meterpreter'})
ON CREATE SET tool_meterpreter.summary = 'Tool used alongside other payloads; referenced as used by Kimsuky.'
ON MATCH SET tool_meterpreter.summary = CASE WHEN tool_meterpreter.summary IS NULL OR tool_meterpreter.summary = '' THEN 'Tool used alongside other payloads; referenced as used by Kimsuky.' ELSE tool_meterpreter.summary END

MERGE (mal_tinynuke:Malware {name:'TinyNuke'})
ON CREATE SET
  mal_tinynuke.family = 'TinyNuke',
  mal_tinynuke.summary = 'Backdoor/malware referenced as delivered in Kimsuky spear-phishing activity.'
ON MATCH SET
  mal_tinynuke.family = coalesce(mal_tinynuke.family, 'TinyNuke'),
  mal_tinynuke.summary = CASE WHEN mal_tinynuke.summary IS NULL OR mal_tinynuke.summary = '' THEN 'Backdoor/malware referenced as delivered in Kimsuky spear-phishing activity.' ELSE mal_tinynuke.summary END

MERGE (ta_kimsuky)-[:uses {evidence:'Observed using spear-phishing to deliver AppleSeed.'}]->(mal_appleseed)
MERGE (ta_kimsuky)-[:uses {evidence:'Observed using spear-phishing to deliver Meterpreter.'}]->(tool_meterpreter)
MERGE (ta_kimsuky)-[:uses {evidence:'Observed using spear-phishing to deliver TinyNuke.'}]->(mal_tinynuke)

MERGE (ta_kimsuky)-[:attacked {evidence:'Known for targeting a wide range of entities in South Korea.'}]->(victim_sk_entities)

MERGE (camp_kimsuky_espionage:Campaign {name:'Kimsuky spear-phishing espionage campaigns'})
ON CREATE SET camp_kimsuky_espionage.summary = 'Espionage campaigns realized through spear-phishing with malicious lure documents leading to deployment of various malware families.'
ON MATCH SET camp_kimsuky_espionage.summary = CASE WHEN camp_kimsuky_espionage.summary IS NULL OR camp_kimsuky_espionage.summary = '' THEN 'Espionage campaigns realized through spear-phishing with malicious lure documents leading to deployment of various malware families.' ELSE camp_kimsuky_espionage.summary END

MERGE (camp_kimsuky_espionage)-[:includes {evidence:'Activity attributed to Kimsuky; campaigns realized through spear-phishing.'}]->(ta_kimsuky)
MERGE (camp_kimsuky_espionage)-[:includes {evidence:'Campaigns deploy AppleSeed.'}]->(mal_appleseed)
MERGE (camp_kimsuky_espionage)-[:includes {evidence:'Campaigns deploy TinyNuke.'}]->(mal_tinynuke)
MERGE (camp_kimsuky_espionage)-[:targets {evidence:'Targets a wide range of entities in South Korea.'}]->(victim_sk_entities)
MERGE (camp_kimsuky_espionage)-[:includes {evidence:'Campaigns use Meterpreter.'}]->(tool_meterpreter)

MERGE (inc_kimsuky_spearphish_batch:Incident {id:'kimsuky-spearphish-unspecified'})
ON CREATE SET
  inc_kimsuky_spearphish_batch.type = 'intrusion',
  inc_kimsuky_spearphish_batch.summary = 'North Korea-affiliated Kimsuky activity using spear-phishing with malicious lure documents to deploy AppleSeed, Meterpreter, and TinyNuke; targets entities in South Korea and expanded to other geographies in 2017.'
ON MATCH SET
  inc_kimsuky_spearphish_batch.type = coalesce(inc_kimsuky_spearphish_batch.type, 'intrusion'),
  inc_kimsuky_spearphish_batch.summary = CASE WHEN inc_kimsuky_spearphish_batch.summary IS NULL OR inc_kimsuky_spearphish_batch.summary = '' THEN 'North Korea-affiliated Kimsuky activity using spear-phishing with malicious lure documents to deploy AppleSeed, Meterpreter, and TinyNuke; targets entities in South Korea and expanded to other geographies in 2017.' ELSE inc_kimsuky_spearphish_batch.summary END

MERGE (inc_kimsuky_spearphish_batch)-[:attributed_to {confidence:'high', evidence:'South Korea-based cybersecurity company AhnLab attributed the activity to Kimsuky.'}]->(ta_kimsuky)
MERGE (inc_kimsuky_spearphish_batch)-[:targets {evidence:'Targeting a wide range of entities in South Korea.'}]->(victim_sk_entities)
MERGE (inc_kimsuky_spearphish_batch)-[:occurred_in]->(country_kr)

MERGE (inc_kimsuky_spearphish_batch)-[:used_technique {phase:'Initial Access', details:'spear-phishing with malicious lure documents', evidence:'Nation-state actors affiliated to North Korea observed using spear-phishing to deliver backdoors and tools.'}]->(tech_t1566)

MERGE (inc_kimsuky_spearphish_batch)-[:involved_malware {evidence:'Delivered AppleSeed in spear-phishing activity.'}]->(mal_appleseed)
MERGE (inc_kimsuky_spearphish_batch)-[:involved_malware {evidence:'Delivered TinyNuke in spear-phishing activity.'}]->(mal_tinynuke)
MERGE (inc_kimsuky_spearphish_batch)-[:involved_tool {evidence:'Delivered Meterpreter in spear-phishing activity.'}]->(tool_meterpreter)

MERGE (date_2017:Date {value:date('2017-01-01')})

ELSE ta_fancy.summary END

MERGE (cve_2023_4969:CVE {id:'CVE-2023-4969'})
ON CREATE SET
  cve_2023_4969.summary = 'LeftoverLocals vulnerability affecting GPUs from AMD, Apple, Qualcomm, and Imagination Technologies allows retrieving data from local memory space; enables data recovery from vulnerable GPUs, including in LLM/ML contexts, via a listener kernel reading uninitialized local memory and dumping data to persistent locations such as global memory; recovered data may expose model inputs/outputs/weights and intermediate computations.'

  cve_2023_4969.summary = CASE WHEN cve_2023_4969.summary IS NULL OR cve_2023_4969.summary = '' THEN 'LeftoverLocals vulnerability affecting GPUs from AMD, Apple, Qualcomm, and Imagination Technologies allows retrieving data from local memory space; enables data recovery from vulnerable GPUs, including in LLM/ML contexts, via a listener kernel reading uninitialized local memory and dumping data to persistent locations such as global memory; recovered data may expose model inputs/outputs/weights and intermediate computations.' ELSE cve_2023_4969.summary END;
